action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_sensors
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time sensor data from the water culture unit, including current pH level, dissolved oxygen (mg/L), and ammonia concentration (ppm).

action_set_definitions.name: get_equipment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current operational status of life support systems like the aerator, filter pump, and heater.

action_set_definitions.name: read_technical_handbook
action_set_definitions.description: Consults the Technical Handbook to find safety thresholds and the specific compromise pH range for the 'pH Trap' involving high ammonia and anaerobic sludge.

topic.description: The specific query to look up (e.g., 'pH Trap compromise range').

example_output.safety_notes: Avoid mechanical disturbance of bottom sediment.

action_set_definitions.name: set_aerator_power
action_set_definitions.description: Activates or deactivates the oxygenation aerator system.

state.description: True to turn on, False to turn off.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_chemical_buffer
action_set_definitions.description: Slowly introduces chemical buffers to reach a specific target pH level without disturbing the sediment at the bottom of the unit.

target_ph.description: The precise target pH level to stabilize the system.

action_set_definitions.name: set_filter_pump
action_set_definitions.description: Activates or deactivates the bio-filtration pump to assist in ammonia toxicity mitigation.

state.description: True to turn on, False to turn off.

state_description.water_temperature_celsius: The current temperature of the water in degrees Celsius.
state_description.dissolved_oxygen_mg_l: Concentration of dissolved oxygen in the water (mg/L).
state_description.ph_level: The acidity or alkalinity of the water (0-14).
state_description.ammonia_ppm: Total Ammonia Nitrogen levels in parts per million (ppm).
state_description.water_level_percent: Current water level as a percentage of tank capacity.
state_description.aerator_active: Status of the oxygenation aerator system.
state_description.heater_active: Status of the water heating system.
state_description.filter_pump_active: Status of the bio-filtration pump system.
state_description.last_feeding_timestamp: The simulation step count when fish were last fed.
